body.title: Management phrase dispatch: whole-word matching, not substring; add refractory check
body.result: Whole-word re.search(r'\b...\b') replaces substring match. Refractory set after dispatch (10min TTL). Updated test + 1 new whole-word boundary test. 1684 pass. Committed 251cf333.
body.description: basal_ganglia.py MANAGEMENT_PHRASES (~line 609-626) uses substring containment on raw_lower — fires at 0.97 confidence bypassing BG scoring AND the refractory period. A phrase in any message (e.g. 'goal continuation: here is what I did') triggers PROC_GOAL_CONTINUATION regardless of context. Fix: (1) replace substring with whole-word regex (re.search(r'\bphrase\b')); (2) add refractory_map check before line 626 return. Safety finding from deep-audit Panel 5.
